ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gacha_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward obtained */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reward was obtained */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of the reward (e.g., Weapon, Character) */,
  "rarity" INTEGER /* Rarity level of the reward (e.g., 3, 4, 5 stars) */,
  "wish_count" INTEGER /* Number of wishes made to obtain the reward */,
  "pity_count" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive non-rare wishes (pity count) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who obtained the reward */,
  "game_session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the game session */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the reward was obtained (e.g., iOS, Android) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Device ID of the player */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the player when the reward was obtained */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the player when the reward was obtained */,
  "currency_spent" REAL /* Amount of in-game currency spent to obtain the reward */,
  "reward_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the reward (e.g., special effects, bonuses) */,
  "is_first_wish" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the first wish of the player */,
  "is_last_wish" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the last wish of the player */,
  "is_pity_reward" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is a pity reward (obtained due to consecutive non-rare wishes) */,
  "is_event_reward" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is an event-specific reward */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event if the reward is event-specific */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event if the reward is event-specific */,
  "event_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event if the reward is event-specific */,
  "event_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event if the reward is event-specific */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event if the reward is event-specific */,
  "reward_source" TEXT /* Source of the reward (e.g., standard gacha, event gacha) */,
  "reward_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reward obtained */,
  "reward_quality" TEXT /* Quality level of the reward (e.g., excellent, good) */,
  "reward_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the reward in the game */,
  "reward_rarity_modifier" TEXT /* Modifier applied to the reward rarity (e.g., increased rarity during events) */,
  "reward_type_modifier" TEXT /* Modifier applied to the reward type (e.g., increased chance of obtaining a character) */,
  "reward_pity_modifier" TEXT /* Modifier applied to the reward pity count (e.g., increased pity count) */,
  "reward_event_modifier" TEXT /* Modifier applied to the reward during events */,
  "reward_user_modifier" TEXT /* Modifier applied to the reward based on the user's activity or status */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server on which the reward was obtained */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Player's level at the time of the wish */,
  "player_experience" REAL /* Player's experience points at the time of the wish */,
  "reward_usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the reward has been used */,
  "reward_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the reward */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the gacha transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for spending in-game currency */,
  "reward_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the reward image */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reward */,
  "is_featured_reward" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the reward is featured */,
  "reward_obtained_from" TEXT /* Source from which the reward was obtained (e.g., campaign, promotion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each reward obtained
Timestamp of when the reward was obtained
Name of the reward
Type of the reward (e.g., Weapon, Character)
